title: Four OpenClaw Flaws Enable Data Theft, Privilege Escalation, and Persistence
description: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed a set of four security flaws in OpenClaw that could be chained to achieve data theft, privilege escalation, and persistence.   The vulnerabilities, collectively dubbed        Claw Chain      by Cyera, can permit an attacker to establish a foothold, expose sensitive data, and plant backdoors.
